# REST Reset

> REST Reset is a gentle, guided small-group coaching experience by Learning While Healing, three Zoom evenings to help mentally tired women find clarity, emotional breathing room, and peace again.

REST Reset is held July 7 to 9, 2026 (Tuesday to Thursday), 7:00 PM to 9:30 PM Philippine time via Zoom. Early bird pricing of ₱999 is available until July 5, 2026 at 11:59 PM (PHT); regular price is ₱1,499 starting July 6. Open to all women seeking clarity, healing, and emotional renewal, no prior coaching experience required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of REST Reset, the REST framework, testimonials, pricing, and registration.

## Optional

- [Checkout](https://checkout.xendit.co/od/RESTJune2026): Secure checkout for REST Reset (Xendit, GCash, Maya, cards).
